label: Stage fail trigger (target pawn unreachable)
description: Fails the stage when the taker pawn cannot reach the takee pawn.

allowanceTicks.label: Allowance ticks
allowanceTicks.description: Number of ticks the condition is allowed to persist before the stage fails.

takerId.label: Taker ID
takerId.description: Role ID of the pawn doing the taking/moving.

takeeId.label: Takee ID
takeeId.description: Role ID of the pawn that must be reachable.
